new_value.cascade_risk: AMOC collapse would trigger Arctic cooling of approximately 7 degrees C, Antarctic warming of approximately 6 degrees C, and disrupt West African monsoon and European agriculture
new_value.cascade_chain: AMOC weakening shifts Gulf Stream northward, followed by abrupt 219 km displacement within two years, occurring decades before collapse; collapse releases 47 to 83 ppm additional atmospheric CO2, adding approximately 0.2 degrees C global warming; precipitation shifts disrupt Sahel, West Africa, South Asia food and water security; displacement and conflict risk escalates
